rulings.Case Title: CAITLIN FITTING et al VS. PAUL KRAAIJVANGER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Andmotion For An Order Permitting Discovery Of Defts ;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 13, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFFS CAITLIN FITTING, GLORIA GUTIERREZ, MAXIMILIANO VALLE, EDWARDO GUTIERREZ, MARIA VALLE, FELIZ-ALBERTO VALLE, LUISA VALLE, ROES 1 TO 20 and TERESA VALLE's Motion For An Order Permitting Discovery Of Defendants. Deny. No authority provided re jurisidiction of defendant party who hasn't appeared. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL BASS et al VS. JOSEPH GERARD DALEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 13, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANTS JOSEPH DALEY and MONICA FORSMAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Demurrer as to Forsman: Sustain with leave to amend as to each cause of action to allege facts to support each element of each cause of action and or facts to allege Forsman's acts in furtherance of consipriacy. Demurrer as to Dalely: 1) Overrule - fraud cause of action sufficiently plead; 2) IIED - sustain with leave to amend to allege outrageous conduct (See Nevby) and facts re severe distress; 3) Constructive Eviction - Sustain with leave to amend to allege series of acts which deprive Plaintiff of Beneficial Interest (See Sanders). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL BASS et al VS. JOSEPH GERARD DALEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 13, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANTS JOSEPH DALEY and MONICA FORSMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Deny, Motion to Strike in view of rulings on demurrer. = (501/REQ)
